data.body: Investigation RESULT: ROOT_CAUSE: The '(merge $branch)' grep pattern in _offer_worktree_cleanup (claude-safe) and is_branch_merged (worktree-cleanup.sh) only matches the internal merge-to-main.sh format, not GitHub PR merge commits ('Merge pull request #N from org/branch'). confidence: high. Proposed fix: add third fallback grep for branch name alone. Hypothesis tests: (1) existing pattern → no match (confirmed); (2) plain branch-name grep → match (confirmed); (3) gh pr list → works but network-dependent (confirmed). Gate 1a: intent-aligned (CLI_user tag). testing_mode=RED — no existing test covers GitHub PR merge commit format.
